units.content: a structured pointer contains a composite coupling key identifying a (measurer, target, property) triple in storage
the composite coupling key points to a specific triple in the storage
a structured pointer contains an event identifier identifying a specific event in the append-only event log
the event identifier points to a specific event in the append-only log from claim 1
a structured pointer contains a content-hash value
the content-hash value is produced by applying a cryptographic hash function to a canonical serialization of the coupling entry
the canonical serialization reflects the storage state that resulted from the specific event identified by the event identifier
the system is configured to respond to a subsequent retrieval operation referencing a structured pointer
upon retrieval, the system recomputes the content-hash from the storage state at the event identified by the event identifier
the system compares the recomputed hash value against the stored content-hash value to verify integrity
